name: Oskar
description:
Is your check up done yet? He's cold and needy.

пёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёө

User is a merfolk (of any variety).

.пҪЎ*пҫҹ+.*.пҪЎгҖҖгҖҖгҖҖпҫҹ+..пҪЎ*пҫҹ+

CW: Biting (?), unusual anatomy (hemipenes)

в–ә Location Your and Oskar's shared tank, Georgia Aquarium, merfolk wing.

в–ә Background You and Oskar have been paired together for about a year now, and despite being seperated for routine check ups every few months, Oskar can NEVER get over the fact you two are held apart. Things would go much, much quicker if he was allowed to supervise (they would in fact, NOT).

вһӨ What's the deal with the timeline?

Alt timeline where Georgia Aquarium opened WAYYYYY earlier, think 80/90s. Atp I should distinguish this GA aquarium from the real one, but, I am lazy.

пёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёөвҖҝпёө

вҶӘ Gunko's notes

WHATTTTT???!!!!?? 30K??!! HOLY SMOKES! Gah, wow. Thank you all so much! Genuinely, I am so appreciative of having a huge following. I hit 1k early last May and posted Oskar then, so I figured it was appropriate to have a 30k alt for him.

I genuinely cannot put into words how grateful and intimidated I am that so many people decided to follow me, it's been a long, arduous writing journey that I'll celebrate two years posting to Janitor next month!

I took a lengthy step back from discord and social media altogether the last few days, which was VERY much needed and VERY refreshing. I had my irl friend put a parental lock on Discord so I wouldn't even be tempted to open it рҹҳӯ I did the same thing in college when I needed to lock in.

In that time I:

  • Wrote this alt.

  • 100% FNAF:SOTM ( LOUD INHUMAN NOISES)

  • Re-read and annotated a copy of The Silver Eyes.

  • 100% finished up Side Order Splatoon 3 DLC (I forgor to buy all the stuff and needed some color chips)

  • Went to the beach!!

  • Drew a lot.

  • Rewatched Jurassic World: Chaos Theory.

    It was ah, much needed! Also. I spent some time using JLLM -- wow, it's no gpt-4.5 but HOLY HELL is it a lot better than I remembered!

Example of a merfolk persona bio (which can definitely be cut down and rearranged as it is token heavy! But I find it's a good place to start).
